$schema_note: Machine-readable bibliography for EM-Tracking-Definitive-Guide. Every entry must be verifiable. 'verified' = checked against an authoritative index (IEEE Xplore, PubMed, DOI resolver, patent office) during research. Fields: id, type, title, authors, year, venue, volume, issue, pages, doi, url, publisher, source_type, keywords, relevance, confidence, notes, verified.

entries.title: Magnetic Position and Orientation Tracking System
entries.venue: IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems
entries.notes: Seminal formalization of quasi-static magnetic-dipole 6-DOF tracking. DOI inferred from IEEE TAES AES-15(5); page range 709-718 confirmed via multiple indexes.

entries.title: Electromagnetic Tracking in Medicine—A Review of Technology, Validation, and Applications
entries.notes: The definitive modern review of medical EMT. DOI and citation verified via PubMed/dblp.

entries.title: Design and application of an assessment protocol for electromagnetic tracking systems
entries.notes: Standardized phantom/protocol for comparable EMT accuracy assessment. DOI verified. Volume/issue/pages to re-confirm against Wiley record.

entries.title: A Novel Method for Nonfluoroscopic Catheter-Based Electroanatomical Mapping of the Heart: In Vitro and In Vivo Accuracy Results
entries.notes: Foundational clinical paper underlying the Biosense CARTO system. PMID 9118532 verified.

entries.title: Systematic distortions in magnetic position digitizers
entries.notes: Early systematic characterization of field distortion in magnetic digitizers. DOI/pages to re-confirm against Wiley record; citation widely reported as Med Phys 25(11):2242-2248.

entries.title: A survey of electromagnetic position tracker calibration techniques
entries.notes: Survey of EMT calibration/distortion-correction methods (interpolation, polynomial, shape functions). DOI verified; volume/issue/pages to re-confirm.

entries.title: A new method for magnetic position and orientation tracking
entries.notes: Rotating quasi-static field method; alternative excitation/decoding strategy. DOI to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: 3-D Magnetic Tracking of a Single Subminiature Coil with a Large 2-D Array of Uniaxial Transmitters
entries.notes: Array-of-transmitters architecture with subarray tracking for speed. DOI/article-id to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: Magnetic Sensors and Their Applications
entries.notes: Canonical review comparing all major magnetic sensor families incl. search coil, fluxgate, Hall, AMR, GMR, magnetic tunnel junctions. Vol 6, pp 631-649 confirmed; DOI to re-confirm against IEEE record.

entries.title: Magnetoresistive sensor detectivity: A comparative analysis
entries.notes: Comparative noise/detectivity analysis of GMR vs TMR(MTJ); finds detectivity scales with die area and converges across types when normalized for linear range. DOI verified via AIP.

entries.title: Electromagnetic tracking in the clinical environment
entries.notes: Clinical-environment characterization of EMT accuracy and distortion. Citation 36(3):876-892, DOI 10.1118/1.3075829, PMID 19378748 verified.

entries.title: Aurora Electromagnetic Tracking System — Sensors (5DOF/6DOF, micro 0.3 mm)
entries.notes: Vendor source for medical-grade sensor form factors (e.g., micro 5DOF ~0.3 mm dia). Vendor-reported; access year approximate.

entries.title: IEC 60601-1 Medical electrical equipment — Part 1: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance
entries.notes: Governing safety standard for medical electrical equipment. Patient leakage limits e.g. Type CF 10 uA normal / 50 uA single-fault; two Means of Protection required. Edition history per IEC webstore.

entries.title: IEC 60601-1-2 Medical electrical equipment — Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance — Collateral standard: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and tests
entries.notes: EMC collateral standard. 4th ed (2014) shifted to risk/intended-use-based tests by environment (professional healthcare / home / special). Edition 4.1 = Amendment 1 (2020).

entries.title: The Art of Electronics, 3rd Edition
entries.notes: Standard reference for low-noise analog design (amplifier voltage/current noise, noise matching, instrumentation amps). ISBN 978-0521809269.

entries.title: Analog-to-Digital Converter Survey and Analysis
entries.venue: IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
entries.notes: Canonical ADC survey; establishes resolution-vs-rate trends and limiting mechanisms (thermal at low rate, ~1 bit/octave fall-off at high rate; aperture jitter). DOI 10.1109/49.761034 verified.

entries.title: IEEE Standard for Terminology and Test Methods for Analog-to-Digital Converters
entries.notes: Defines ADC error terminology and FFT-based test methods (ENOB from SINAD, etc.). Multiple editions (2000/2010/2023); cite the edition used in a given measurement.

entries.title: Frequency-domain description of a lock-in amplifier
entries.notes: Clear pedagogical/quantitative treatment of lock-in (synchronous) detection. DOI 10.1119/1.17629 verified.

entries.title: A New Approach to Linear Filtering and Prediction Problems
entries.venue: Transactions of the ASME — Journal of Basic Engineering
entries.notes: The foundational Kalman filter paper. Vol 82(1):35-45, DOI 10.1115/1.3662552 verified.

entries.title: Unscented Filtering and Nonlinear Estimation
entries.notes: Definitive review of the unscented transform/UKF for nonlinear estimation. DOI 10.1109/JPROC.2003.823141 verified.

entries.title: Estimation with Applications to Tracking and Navigation: Theory, Algorithms and Software
entries.notes: Standard reference for estimation/tracking (KF/EKF, filtering, CRLB, fusion). ISBN 978-0471416555; DOI 10.1002/0471221279.

entries.title: An Algorithm for Least-Squares Estimation of Nonlinear Parameters
entries.venue: Journal of the Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics
entries.notes: The Levenberg-Marquardt algorithm; workhorse nonlinear solver for EMT pose. DOI 10.1137/0111030 verified.

entries.title: Fundamentals of Statistical Signal Processing, Volume I: Estimation Theory
entries.notes: Standard reference for MLE, CRLB/Fisher information, and Bayesian estimation used in Ch. 23-24. ISBN 0133457117.

entries.title: Numerical Optimization, 2nd Edition
entries.venue: Springer (Springer Series in Operations Research and Financial Engineering)
entries.notes: Standard numerical-optimization reference (Gauss-Newton, trust-region/LM, convergence, conditioning). ISBN 9780387303031.

entries.title: Interference during the use of an electromagnetic tracking system under OR conditions
entries.notes: Quantifies EMT interference under operating-room conditions: ambient EM noise error <0.15 mm RMS, but ferromagnetic/electrical devices up to 8.4 mm / 166 deg. DOI verified; PMID 12020992.

entries.title: Constant TMR magnetic field sensor detectivity with bias voltage
entries.venue: arXiv preprint (cf. published version in Sensors)
entries.notes: Shows TMR detectivity stays roughly constant vs bias voltage because sensitivity and noise scale together — central to the 'bias-reference noise in biased sensors' error term. arXiv:2103.04750 (authors verified); a published Sensors version exists (to link).

entries.title: Enhancing electromagnetic tracking accuracy in medical applications using pre-trained witness sensor distortion models
entries.venue: International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery
entries.notes: Witness-sensor distortion compensation: measures field variation at a witness position to identify/compensate a distorter without sensors on it; C-arm error reduced to 1.52 mm RMS. DOI verified.

entries.title: Neural network-based calibration of electromagnetic tracking systems
entries.notes: Neural-network calibration compensating position and orientation error; compared to traditional methods. Vol 9(1):70-78, DOI verified.

entries.title: Polhemus History — Over 50 Years of Experience
entries.notes: Vendor history: founded 1969 by Bill Polhemus, Colchester VT; AC EM tracking originating in military aviation head-tracking. Products FASTRAK/LIBERTY/PATRIOT/G4. Vendor-reported.

entries.title: Our History — Northern Digital Inc. (NDI)
entries.notes: Vendor history of NDI (Waterloo, Ontario): optical (Polaris) and EM (Aurora) navigation. Vendor-reported; corroborate dates with independent sources.

entries.title: Ascension Technology of Milton acquired by Roper Industries
entries.notes: News report: Ascension (co-founded 1986 by Jack Scully & Ernie Blood; DC 'Flock of Birds') assets sold to Roper Industries (~US$19M, 2012); operated under NDI. Trade-press source.

entries.title: Johnson & Johnson Buys Biosense for $400 Mln in Shares
entries.notes: News: Biosense (founded 1993 by Shlomo Ben-Haim) acquired by J&J in 1997 (~$400M in shares); became Biosense Webster. Trade-press source; CARTO scientific basis is Gepstein 1997 [gepstein1997].

entries.title: Covidien acquisition of superDimension (electromagnetic navigation bronchoscopy); Medtronic–Covidien close (2015)
entries.notes: superDimension ENB acquired by Covidien (~$300M, 2012); Medtronic closed Covidien acquisition Jan 2015. Trade-press/vendor sources; verify exact figures if cited precisely.

entries.title: Our Technology — AC Electromagnetic Tracking
entries.notes: Vendor self-description of AC electromagnetic tracking; used only for vendor-attributed claims. Access year approximate; treat as living document.
